sourceConfidence.detail: Derived from refreshed SQL dashboard views over real YouTube data.

highlights.title: YouTube baseline refreshed
highlights.detail: 65 videos and 15 comments are available for BI analysis.

highlights.title: Highlands dominates reach
highlights.detail: Highlands Coffee Vietnam is the strongest owned-channel signal in the current dataset.

highlights.title: Sentiment is mostly neutral
highlights.detail: 11 of 15 classified comments are neutral; positive=3, negative=1.

risks.title: The Coffee House source confidence
risks.detail: The official YouTube channel was not identified reliably; query-filtered videos are treated as lower-confidence market mentions.

risks.title: Comment sample is small
risks.detail: Only public comments returned by YouTube API are available, so sentiment should be treated as directional.

recommendations: Use refreshed warehouse views as the Power BI source of truth.
Treat The Coffee House YouTube metrics as market mention evidence until an official channel ID is confirmed.
Increase CTA prompts on Highlands videos to move neutral comments toward positive engagement.
